discoveries.name: Metal
discoveries.definition: A solid material that is typically hard, shiny, malleable, fusible, and ductile with good electrical and thermal conductivity.

discoveries.name: Carbon
discoveries.definition: A non-metallic element that forms the basis of organic chemistry and appears in forms from graphite to diamond.

discoveries.name: Ceramic
discoveries.definition: An inorganic non-metallic solid made by firing clay or other materials at high temperatures.

discoveries.name: Polymer
discoveries.definition: A large molecule composed of repeating structural units, forming the basis of plastics and many natural materials.

discoveries.name: Mithril
discoveries.definition: Fictional Tolkien metal; lighter than steel, stronger than titanium, and worth more than gold.

discoveries.name: Unobtanium
discoveries.definition: The material you need but can't get; used in every engineering student's dreams.

discoveries.name: Vibranium
discoveries.definition: Absorbs all vibrations; Wakandan export ban applies.

discoveries.name: Adamantium
discoveries.definition: Indestructible alloy; claws sold separately.

discoveries.name: Nanomachines
discoveries.definition: Self-replicating robots; they harden in response to physical trauma.

discoveries.name: The One Ring
discoveries.definition: Forged in Mount Doom; turns you invisible but corrupts your soul. Also makes you speak in Elvish.

discoveries.name: Alloy
discoveries.definition: Metallic mix; stronger or more corrosion-resistant than pure metals.

discoveries.name: Steel
discoveries.definition: Iron + carbon; the foundation of skyscrapers and swords.

discoveries.name: Cermet
discoveries.definition: Ceramic grains in a metal binder; heat-resistant cutting tools.

discoveries.name: Metal Matrix Composite
discoveries.definition: Metal reinforced with polymer fibers; light and tough.

discoveries.name: Ceramic Matrix Composite
discoveries.definition: Ceramic fibers in ceramic base; survives 2000°C.

discoveries.name: Carbon Fiber
discoveries.definition: Thin carbon strands; 5x steel's strength at 1/5 the weight.

discoveries.name: Oxide
discoveries.definition: Metal oxide or ceramic oxide; forms protective layers.

discoveries.name: Organic Polymer
discoveries.definition: Natural or synthetic chain molecules; plastics, rubber, DNA.

discoveries.name: Glass
discoveries.definition: Amorphous silica; transparent, brittle, recyclable.

discoveries.name: Rubber
discoveries.definition: Elastic polymer; bounces, seals, grips.

discoveries.name: Foam
discoveries.definition: Gas-filled polymer matrix; lightweight insulation.

discoveries.name: Glue
discoveries.definition: Adhesive polymer; bonds anything except broken hearts.

discoveries.name: Paint
discoveries.definition: Pigment + binder; protects surfaces and looks pretty.

discoveries.name: Brick
discoveries.definition: Fired clay; cheap, compressive strength, built civilizations.

discoveries.name: Cement
discoveries.definition: Powder that hardens with water; makes concrete possible.

discoveries.name: Silicon
discoveries.definition: Semiconductor base; the heart of every microchip.

discoveries.name: Copper
discoveries.definition: Conductive metal; wires, PCBs, and the Statue of Liberty.

discoveries.name: Bronze
discoveries.definition: Copper + tin; the alloy that ended the Stone Age.

discoveries.name: Brass
discoveries.definition: Copper + zinc; shiny, acoustic, and antimicrobial.

discoveries.name: Stainless Steel
discoveries.definition: Chromium-steel; doesn't rust, doesn't stain, does dishes.

discoveries.name: Titanium Alloy
discoveries.definition: Ti-6Al-4V; aerospace, medical, bike frames.

discoveries.name: Aluminum Alloy
discoveries.definition: 7075-T6; lightweight, stressed, used in fighter jets.

discoveries.name: Cast Iron
discoveries.definition: 2-4% carbon; hard, brittle, makes great pancakes.

discoveries.name: Glass Ceramic
discoveries.definition: Crystalline glass; thermal shock resistant (cooktops).

discoveries.name: Carbon-Carbon Composite
discoveries.definition: Carbon fibers in carbon matrix; rocket nozzles and F1 brakes.

discoveries.name: Kevlar
discoveries.definition: Aramid; stops bullets, holds bridges, saves lives.

discoveries.name: Fiberglass
discoveries.definition: Glass fibers + resin; boats, bathtubs, wind turbines.

discoveries.name: Epoxy Resin
discoveries.definition: Thermoset glue; matrix for composites, art, and flooring.

discoveries.name: Concrete
discoveries.definition: Cement + aggregate; literally everywhere.

discoveries.name: Plywood
discoveries.definition: Wood veneer layers cross-grained; strong, cheap, flat.

discoveries.name: Latex
discoveries.definition: Natural rubber sap; gloves, condoms, elastic.

discoveries.name: Nylon
discoveries.definition: Synthetic polyamide; stockings, ropes, carpets.

discoveries.name: Polyester
discoveries.definition: Synthetic fabric; wrinkles? never met her.

discoveries.name: Acrylic
discoveries.definition: Plexiglass; shatterproof glass alternative.

discoveries.name: Teflon
discoveries.definition: PTFE; non-stick, slippery, used in space suits.

discoveries.name: Silicone
discoveries.definition: Silicon-oxygen polymer; heatproof, flexible, implantable.

discoveries.name: Basalt Fiber
discoveries.definition: Volcanic rock fiber; fireproof, cheap composite reinforcement.

discoveries.name: Jute
discoveries.definition: Natural plant fiber; biodegradable composite filler.

discoveries.name: Chitosan
discoveries.definition: Shellfish-derived biopolymer; wound dressings and food film.

discoveries.name: Cellulose
discoveries.definition: Plant cell wall polymer; paper, cotton, wood.

discoveries.name: Lignin
discoveries.definition: Plant binder; makes wood stiff, paper brown.

discoveries.name: Spider Silk
discoveries.definition: Protein fiber; stronger than steel, stretchier than nylon.

discoveries.name: Thermal Paste
discoveries.definition: Metal oxide + silicone; fills microscopic gaps, keeps CPUs cool.

discoveries.name: PCB
discoveries.definition: Printed Circuit Board; copper traces on insulating board; electronics backbone.

discoveries.name: Inconel
discoveries.definition: Nickel superalloy; jet engines, nuclear reactors.

discoveries.name: Magnesium Alloy
discoveries.definition: Lightest structural alloy; laptops, drones, wheels.

discoveries.name: Tungsten Carbide
discoveries.definition: WC-Co; drill bits, jewelry, armor-piercing rounds.

discoveries.name: Boron Fiber
discoveries.definition: Stiff, lightweight fiber; fishing rods, golf clubs.

discoveries.name: PEEK
discoveries.definition: Polyether ether ketone; spinal implants, aircraft.

discoveries.name: Silicon Carbide
discoveries.definition: SiC; semiconductor, brake discs, bulletproof plates.

discoveries.name: Zirconia
discoveries.definition: ZrO₂; hip joints, dental crowns, oxygen sensors.

discoveries.name: Shape Memory Alloy
discoveries.definition: Nitinol; bends and returns, stents and eyeglass frames.

discoveries.name: Hybrid Composite
discoveries.definition: Stiff + impact-resistant; race car monocoques.

discoveries.name: Bio-glass
discoveries.definition: Bonds with bone; dental implants, bone grafts.

discoveries.name: Graphene
discoveries.definition: 1-atom-thick carbon; 200x steel strength, conductive.

discoveries.name: Carbon Nanotube
discoveries.definition: Rolled graphene; stronger than anything, conducts heat.

discoveries.name: Aerogel
discoveries.definition: 99.8% air; world's lightest solid, insulation.

discoveries.name: Pyrolytic Carbon
discoveries.definition: Biocompatible carbon coating; heart valves.

discoveries.name: Diamond
discoveries.definition: Pure carbon crystal; hardest natural material.

discoveries.name: Graphite
discoveries.definition: Layered carbon; lubricant, battery anodes.

discoveries.name: Boron Nitride
discoveries.definition: "White graphene"; lubricates, insulates, tough.

discoveries.name: MAX Phase
discoveries.definition: Ternary carbide; machinable ceramic, thermal shock resistant.

discoveries.name: Bulk Metallic Glass
discoveries.definition: Amorphous metal; springy, hard, phone hinges.

discoveries.name: High-Entropy Alloy
discoveries.definition: 5+ metals mixed equally; extreme strength, cryo-compatible.

discoveries.name: LCD Screen
discoveries.definition: Liquid Crystal Display; glass + polymer + electronics; pixels everywhere.

discoveries.name: OLED Screen
discoveries.definition: Organic LED; carbon-based pixels, perfect blacks, bends like plastic.

discoveries.name: Solar Panel
discoveries.definition: Silicon + glass + aluminum; converts sunlight to electron flow.

discoveries.name: CPU
discoveries.definition: Silicon chip with billions of transistors; the brain of every device.

discoveries.name: ESP32 Microcontroller
discoveries.definition: WiFi + Bluetooth + CPU on one chip; IoT's favorite brain.

discoveries.name: Turbine Blade
discoveries.definition: Jet fan blade; 1500°C, 10,000 RPM, doesn't melt.

discoveries.name: Aircraft Fuselage
discoveries.definition: 787 Dreamliner skin; 50% composite, 20% fuel saved.

discoveries.name: Rocket Nozzle
discoveries.definition: Survives 3000°C exhaust; cheap at $1M each.

discoveries.name: Bulletproof Vest
discoveries.definition: Kevlar + ceramic plates; Level IV armor; stops rifle rounds.

discoveries.name: Dental Implant
discoveries.definition: Screw-in tooth; lasts 20 years, no cavities.

discoveries.name: Brake Disc
discoveries.definition: F1 brakes; glowing red, 1000°C, still stopping.

discoveries.name: Wind Turbine Blade
discoveries.definition: 100m long; one rotation powers a house for 2 days.

discoveries.name: Spacecraft Heat Shield
discoveries.definition: Ablative shield; 2000°C plasma, keeps astronauts cool.

discoveries.name: Artificial Heart Valve
discoveries.definition: Self-expanding; crimped in catheter, opens in heart.

discoveries.name: Hydrogen Fuel Tank
discoveries.definition: Linerless tank; 700 bar H2, 3x lighter than steel.

discoveries.name: Submarine Hull
discoveries.definition: 1000 atm crush depth; silent, non-magnetic.

discoveries.name: Golf Club Shaft
discoveries.definition: Stiff tip, flexible handle; 10 extra yards.

discoveries.name: Tennis Racket
discoveries.definition: Light, stiff, powerful; pro players use them.

discoveries.name: Bicycle Frame
discoveries.definition: Under 1kg; stiff, responsive, expensive.

discoveries.name: Engine Block
discoveries.definition: 50% lighter than iron; 500hp, stays cool.

discoveries.name: Knee Implant
discoveries.definition: Total knee replacement; 15-year lifespan.

discoveries.name: Bullet Train Nose
discoveries.definition: Aerodynamic, bird-strike resistant, 400km/h.

discoveries.name: Satellite Structure
discoveries.definition: Lightweight, thermally stable, orbits for decades.

discoveries.name: Solar Panel Frame
discoveries.definition: Rigid, conducts heat away; 25-year lifespan.

discoveries.name: Robot Arm
discoveries.definition: Precision movement, low inertia; assembles iPhones.

discoveries.name: Crash Helmet
discoveries.definition: Impact absorption + penetration resistance; F1 safety.

discoveries.name: Boat Hull
discoveries.definition: 40-ft yacht; unsinkable, low maintenance.

discoveries.name: Building Cladding
discoveries.definition: Architectural skin; weatherproof, decorative, insulated.

discoveries.name: Copper-Clad Laminate
discoveries.definition: PCB substrate; every circuit board starts here.

discoveries.name: Fuel Cell Bipolar Plate
discoveries.definition: Conductive, corrosion-free; hydrogen EV heart.

discoveries.name: DJI Drone
discoveries.definition: Magnesium alloy frame + carbon fiber arms; 4K camera flys 30 minutes.

discoveries.name: Nintendo Switch
discoveries.definition: LCD screen + custom CPU + joy-cons; plays anywhere, joy everywhere.

discoveries.name: RTX 5090 Graphics Card
discoveries.definition: 920亿 transistors on silicon + copper + polymer PCB; renders 4K at 500 FPS.

discoveries.name: Gaming PC
discoveries.definition: RTX 5090 + CPU + PCB + aluminum case; destroys frames, heats room.

discoveries.name: Datacenter
discoveries.definition: Thousands of CPUs + copper + fiberglass; powers the cloud, AI, and memes.

discoveries.name: iPhone 17 Pro
discoveries.definition: Titanium frame + OLED screen + A19 CPU + glass back; camera bumps get bigger.

discoveries.name: Ferrari
discoveries.definition: Carbon fiber monocoque + aluminum engine block + hybrid power; V12 screams.

discoveries.name: BYD EV
discoveries.definition: Aluminum body + LFP battery + silicon carbide inverters; 0-60 in 3.4s, Chinese engineering.

discoveries.name: F1 Car
discoveries.definition: Carbon-carbon brakes + hybrid composite monocoque + Inconel exhaust; 20,000 RPM fury.

discoveries.name: Katana
discoveries.definition: Steel folded 1000x + carbon edge; cuts silk, slices bamboo, looks cool.

discoveries.name: MJOLNIR Mk. VII Armor
discoveries.definition: Titanium alloy + shape memory alloy + energy shield (vibranium implied); Master Chief approved.

discoveries.name: Captain America's Shield
discoveries.definition: Vibranium alloy; absorbs all kinetic energy, returns when thrown, 100% patriotic.

discoveries.name: Gym Clothes
discoveries.definition: Spandex + polyester + nylon; stretches, wicks sweat, looks good.

discoveries.name: Duct Tape
discoveries.definition: Fixes everything; engineers' actual secret material.

discoveries.name: Cardboard
discoveries.definition: Corrugated miracle; holds up Amazon's economy.

discoveries.name: Silly Putty
discoveries.definition: Bounces, stretches, copies newspaper; desk toy royalty.

discoveries.name: Bubble Wrap
discoveries.definition: The best stress-relief material.

discoveries.name: Spandex
discoveries.definition: Stretches 500%; zero drag, all fashion.

discoveries.name: Flubber
discoveries.definition: Bounces higher with every drop; chaos ensues.

discoveries.name: Student Loan
discoveries.definition: Composite of debt and dreams; 30-year payoff.

discoveries.name: Coffee
discoveries.definition: The true composite enabler; graduate student fuel.

discoveries.name: Bondo
discoveries.definition: Auto body filler; hides rust, never hides shame.

discoveries.name: Gold
discoveries.definition: Dense, soft, corrosion-proof noble metal; coins, jewelry, and reliable electrical contacts.

discoveries.name: Paper
discoveries.definition: Pressed and dried cellulose fibers; writing, packaging, and origami.

discoveries.name: Textile Fiber
discoveries.definition: A spun thread-like strand woven into fabric or used to reinforce composites.

discoveries.name: Battery
discoveries.definition: An electrochemical cell storing energy between a graphite anode and a metal-oxide cathode.

discoveries.name: Mirror
discoveries.definition: Glass with a reflective metal backing; bounces light into a clear image.

discoveries.name: Wheel
discoveries.definition: A rubber tyre on a metal hub; the invention that rolls civilization forward.

discoveries.name: Crown
discoveries.definition: A gold headpiece; heavy is the head that wears it.

discoveries.name: Drill Bit
discoveries.definition: A metal shaft tipped with diamond grit; bores through almost anything.

discoveries.name: Paperclip
discoveries.definition: A bent loop of metal wire; quietly holds the world's paperwork together.

discoveries.name: Electrode
discoveries.definition: A metal-graphite conductor that ferries current into a reaction.

discoveries.name: Solder
discoveries.definition: A fusible metal glue that joins electrical connections.

discoveries.name: Cable
discoveries.definition: Metal strands woven into fibre; carries power or load over distance.

discoveries.name: Anvil
discoveries.definition: A heavy steel block; where hot metal is hammered into shape.

discoveries.name: Spray Can
discoveries.definition: Pressurised paint in a metal can; instant colour, instant graffiti.

discoveries.name: Forge
discoveries.definition: A brick-and-metal hearth hot enough to soften steel.

discoveries.name: Rebar
discoveries.definition: Steel rod cast into cement; gives concrete its tensile backbone.

discoveries.name: Gasket
discoveries.definition: A silicone-and-metal seal that keeps fluids where they belong.

discoveries.name: Circuit
discoveries.definition: Metal traces on silicon; the smallest unit of electronics.

discoveries.name: Lens
discoveries.definition: Curved glass that bends light to focus or magnify.

discoveries.name: Light Bulb
discoveries.definition: A glass envelope and copper filament; bottled electric sunshine.

discoveries.name: Goggles
discoveries.definition: Glass lenses in a rubber seal; eyes stay safe and dry.

discoveries.name: Fiber Optic
discoveries.definition: Hair-thin glass fibre that pipes the internet at the speed of light.

discoveries.name: Crystal
discoveries.definition: Glass grown into an ordered lattice; sparkles and refracts.

discoveries.name: Stained Glass
discoveries.definition: Coloured glass set in a pattern; cathedrals in light.

discoveries.name: Prism
discoveries.definition: A glass wedge that splits white light into a rainbow.

discoveries.name: Glass Block
discoveries.definition: Cast glass masonry; lets light through a solid wall.

discoveries.name: Patina
discoveries.definition: The green copper oxide that crowns weathered statues.

discoveries.name: Wire
discoveries.definition: Insulated copper strand; the veins of every gadget.

discoveries.name: Coil
discoveries.definition: Looped copper that turns current into a magnetic field.

discoveries.name: Electromagnet
discoveries.definition: Copper coil around steel; magnetism you can switch on.

discoveries.name: Rose Gold
discoveries.definition: A blush-pink copper-gold alloy; jewellery's romantic.

discoveries.name: Bouncy Ball
discoveries.definition: A sphere of cured rubber; obeys physics enthusiastically.

discoveries.name: Tire
discoveries.definition: Carbon-reinforced rubber; grips the road and shrugs off potholes.

discoveries.name: Eraser
discoveries.definition: A rubber nub that lifts graphite off paper; second chances.

discoveries.name: Elastic Band
discoveries.definition: Rubber and fibre stretched into a loop; holds things, snaps fingers.

discoveries.name: Balloon
discoveries.definition: Thin rubber inflated with gas; parties and physics demos.

discoveries.name: Charcoal
discoveries.definition: Carbon-rich burnt wood; fuels grills and sketches.

discoveries.name: Ink
discoveries.definition: Carbon pigment in a binder; thoughts made visible.

discoveries.name: Pencil
discoveries.definition: Graphite core in a cellulose sleeve; the writer's first tool.

discoveries.name: Pottery
discoveries.definition: Painted fired clay; humanity's oldest craft.

discoveries.name: Tile
discoveries.definition: Glazed fired squares; floors, roofs, and mosaics.

discoveries.name: Vase
discoveries.definition: A gilded ceramic vessel; flowers optional.

discoveries.name: Mug
discoveries.definition: A ceramic cup built around the daily coffee ritual.

discoveries.name: Teapot
discoveries.definition: Ceramic with a copper-bright glaze; pours civilisation.

discoveries.name: Gold Bar
discoveries.definition: A solid ingot of refined gold; vaults love it.

discoveries.name: Ring
discoveries.definition: Gold set with a diamond; a circle that means forever.

discoveries.name: Medal
discoveries.definition: A gold-faced steel disc; the weight of a podium finish.

discoveries.name: Sidewalk
discoveries.definition: Poured cement slabs; mind the cracks.

discoveries.name: Wall
discoveries.definition: Stacked, mortared brick; keeps the inside in.

discoveries.name: Column
discoveries.definition: Steel-reinforced cement pillar; holds up the roof and the architecture grade.

discoveries.name: Statue
discoveries.definition: Painted concrete cast into a figure; immortality, weather permitting.

discoveries.name: Book
discoveries.definition: Bound stacks of paper; the original information storage device.

discoveries.name: Poster
discoveries.definition: Paint on a paper sheet; walls with opinions.

discoveries.name: Papier-Mâché
discoveries.definition: Glue-soaked paper moulded into shape; craft-night classic.

discoveries.name: Money
discoveries.definition: Gold-backed paper notes; a shared story everyone agrees on.

discoveries.name: Newspaper
discoveries.definition: Ink pressed onto cheap paper; yesterday's internet.

discoveries.name: Sponge
discoveries.definition: Cellulose foam full of holes; thirsty for spills.

discoveries.name: Cushion
discoveries.definition: Fibre-stuffed foam; gravity's landing pad.

discoveries.name: Mattress
discoveries.definition: Layered rubber foam; a third of your life happens here.

discoveries.name: Mural
discoveries.definition: Paint over paint on a grand scale; a wall with something to say.

discoveries.name: Canvas
discoveries.definition: Cellulose cloth primed for paint; where pictures begin.

discoveries.name: Graffiti
discoveries.definition: Spray paint on brick; the street's signature.

discoveries.name: Sticker
discoveries.definition: A painted adhesive patch; decorates laptops and water bottles.

discoveries.name: Silicon Wafer
discoveries.definition: A polished silicon disc; the blank canvas of every chip.

discoveries.name: Gold Contact
discoveries.definition: A gold-plated silicon pad; corrosion-proof signal path.

discoveries.name: Espresso
discoveries.definition: Coffee concentrated into liquid focus.

discoveries.name: Latte
discoveries.definition: Espresso softened with foamed milk; foam art included.

discoveries.name: Cold Brew
discoveries.definition: Coffee steeped slow in a glass; smooth and over-caffeinated.

discoveries.name: Coffee Filter
discoveries.definition: A paper cone that holds back the grounds.

discoveries.name: Moka Pot
discoveries.definition: A metal stovetop brewer; Italy's morning engine.

discoveries.name: Essay
discoveries.definition: Pencil meets paper at 2am; due in the morning.

discoveries.name: Library
discoveries.definition: Books upon books; a building that holds quiet thunder.

discoveries.name: Disco Ball
discoveries.definition: A sphere of mirrors; scatters light across the dance floor.

discoveries.name: Robot
discoveries.definition: A steel body wired with circuits; does the boring jobs.

discoveries.name: Skyscraper
discoveries.definition: Steel skeleton wrapped in glass; ambition made vertical.

discoveries.name: House
discoveries.definition: Four walls and a roof; where the wifi is.

discoveries.name: Grad Student
discoveries.definition: Coffee plus a student loan; runs on deadlines and ramen.

discoveries.name: Artist
discoveries.definition: Paint plus canvas plus suffering; makes the murals.

discoveries.name: Telescope
discoveries.definition: Lens upon lens in a tube; brings the stars close.

discoveries.name: Camera
discoveries.definition: A lens, a circuit, a captured moment.

discoveries.name: Battery Pack
discoveries.definition: Wired cells in a case; portable power.

discoveries.name: Motor
discoveries.definition: An electromagnet spun by current; turns electricity into motion.
